scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:ml: cd ml-service && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python train.py
scripts.setup:cv: cd cv-service && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python train.py
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:cv"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:cv"
